App: Dimpact e2e test
Test Environment: Test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 4s 826ms

When "Bob" logs in 666ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 407ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 504ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 410ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 704ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 451ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 26ms

When "Bob" logs in 601ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 325ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 446ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 471ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 677ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 1s 493ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 25ms

When "Bob" logs in 572ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 1s 324ms

Feature:Zaken verdelen / vrijgeven 2

Scenario:
Bob distributes zaken to a group
8

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 1s 850ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" 1s 99ms

And the page is done searching 2s 53ms

And there are at least 3 zaken 32ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken 331ms

And "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available 771ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is starting 456ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears 7ms

Scenario:
Bob releases zaken
8

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 1s 930ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" 1s 107ms

And the page is done searching 2s 42ms

And there are at least 3 zaken 30ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken 266ms

And "Bob" releases the zaken 312ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the releasement of zaken is starting 288ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears 8ms
